scenarios.title: Lategame Arsenal
scenarios.description: Two-player late-game lab with full tech, large armies, and maximum resources.

scenarios.title: Render Preview
scenarios.description: Imported two-player lab setup for checking exported render coverage.

scenarios.title: Tank Trap Cluster Clearing
scenarios.description: Three tanks and ten neutral Tank Traps arranged to demonstrate four-tile A-click cluster clearing, with two out-of-radius controls.

scenarios.title: Supply 300 2v2 Hellhole
scenarios.description: Four-player 2v2 Lab stress setup with 470 isolated stone occluders, two dense interleaved central armies, and two scripted diagonal shuttle armies.
